tools.Name: Unsloth
tools.Description: A high-performance framework for training and running open-source LLMs like Qwen, Gemma, and Llama, offering significantly faster training and lower VRAM usage.
tools.Use_Case: Fine-tuning large language models on local hardware or notebooks with high efficiency.

tools.Name: Mem0
tools.Description: A universal memory layer for AI agents that remembers user preferences, session history, and provides adaptive personalization over time.
tools.Use_Case: Enhancing customer support chatbots, AI assistants, and personalized AI agents with long-term memory.

tools.Name: TradingView-MCP
tools.Description: An advanced MCP server providing AI-powered market analysis, including technical indicators, backtesting, and sentiment analysis for stocks and crypto.
tools.Use_Case: Automated market research and technical analysis for AI agents or personal traders.
